content.full_text:
January 20, 1977

Ms. Jaci Pappas  
City Clerk  
915 "I" Street  
City Hall, Room 203  
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Jaci:

In response to your letter of January 7, 1977, the mayor and members of the council who filed anniversary statements as of December 23, 1976 will be deemed to be in compliance with the law and will not have an obligation to file in 1977. Their next statement, however, will cover the period from the closing date of their last statement through December 31, 1977. Otherwise, there would be, in some instances, over a month which would not be included on any statement. To avoid confusion, it might be helpful for the mayor and members to notify us through you indicating that the filing made in 1976 satisfied their 1977 requirement.

You are correct concerning the filing deadline and period covered by the city manager's statement. He will file no later than April 1, 1977 covering the period from the closing date of his last statement through December 31, 1976.

Very truly yours,

REGINA SICILIANO-KUTCHINS  
Technical Assistance Program Coordinator

RSK:mak  
bcc: Jeanne P.
